zh.Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, D: 德國巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Johann Jakob Stober於1627年1月16日出生在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 卡爾茲盧斯圖斯塔福特時，他的父親Johann Martin Stober21歲，母親Anna Catherina Wolf26歲。他於1645年2月21日與Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特結婚。他們至少是12個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特被列為schoolmaster, mayor。他去世於1691年10月23日在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 卡爾茲盧斯圖斯塔福特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johann Jakob Stober于1627年1月16日出生在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 卡爾茲盧斯圖斯塔福特时，他的父亲Johann Martin Stober21岁，母亲Anna Catherina Wolf26岁。他于1645年2月21日与Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特结婚。他们至少是12个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特被列为schoolmaster, mayor。他去世于1691年10月23日在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 卡爾茲盧斯圖斯塔福特。

nameMeanings.name: Stober
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (also Stöber): from Middle High German stöuber ‘hunting dog’, for a hunter or for a curious, restless person.

Germanized form of Sorbian Stobor: from the Old Sorbian personal name Stobor, derived from the imperative stoj ‘stand, stay’ (later interpreted as if derived from sto ‘hundred’) + the element bor ‘to fight’.

variants.name: Stoeber
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Willi.

variants.name: Stoebner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Darrold, Helmuth.
German (also Stöbner): variant of Stöber (see Stober ). The surname Stoebner or Stöbner is very rare in Germany.

variants.name: Stover
meanings: North German (Stöver): from Middle Low German (bad)stover ‘bather, barber, worker at a public bathhouse’, mainly an occupational name, but occasionally perhaps a nickname for a dedicated bather. Compare Stoever .
English: variant of   Stopher   with intervocalic voicing of /f/ to /v/.

nameMeanings.name: Johann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Jakob
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: spelling of   Jacob  , now also used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Jacob
meanings: Biblical name, from Hebrew Yaakov. This was borne by perhaps the most important of all the patriarchs in the Book of Genesis. Jacob was the father of twelve sons, who gave their names to the twelve tribes of Israel. He was the son of Isaac and Rebecca and twin brother of Esau. According to the story in Genesis, he was the cunning younger twin, who persuaded his brother Esau to part with his right to his inheritance in exchange for a bowl of soup (‘a mess of pottage’). Later, he tricked his blind and dying father into blessing him in place of Esau. The derivation of the name has been much discussed. It is traditionally explained as being derived from Hebrew akev ‘heel’ and to have meant ‘heel grabber’, because when Jacob was born ‘his hand took hold of Esau's heel’ (Genesis 25:26). This is interpreted later in the Bible as ‘supplanter’ Esau himself remarks, ‘Is he not rightly named Jacob? for he has supplanted me these two times’ (Genesis 27:36). Jacob is especially common as a Jewish given name, although it also became very popular among the Puritans from the 16th century onwards, and has again been widely used since the 1990s. Compare James .

en.lifeSummary: When Johann Jakob Stober was born on 16 January 1627, in Staffort, Stutensee, Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, his father, Johann Martin Stober, was 21 and his mother, Anna Catherina Wolf, was 26. He married Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager on 21 February 1645, in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. They were the parents of at least 12 sons and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as schoolmaster, mayor in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. He died on 23 October 1691, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Staffort, Stutensee, Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johann Jakob Stober est né le 16 janvier 1627, à Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Johann Martin Stober, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Anna Catherina Wolf, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager le 21 février 1645, à Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Ils ont eu au moins 12 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est schoolmaster, mayor à Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Il est décédé le 23 octobre 1691, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johann Jakob Stober am 16. Januar 1627 in Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Johann Martin Stober 21 und seine Mutter Anna Catherina Wolf 26. Er hat am 21. Februar 1645 in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 12 Söhne und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als schoolmaster, mayor in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden aufgeführt. Er starb am 23. Oktober 1691 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Jakob Stober è nato il il 16 gennaio 1627 nel Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, il suo padre, Johann Martin Stober, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Anna Catherina Wolf, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager il 21 febbraio 1645, nel Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figli e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come schoolmaster, mayor nel Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Morì il 23 ottobre 1691, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Germania.

ja.Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, D: ドイツバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォート
ja.lifeSummary: Johann Jakob Stoberが1627年1月16日にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグランドクレイス カルルスルヘストゥテンセスタフォートで生まれた時，父Johann Martin Stoberは21歳，母Anna Catherina Wolfは26歳であった。1645年2月21日にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォートでAnna Margaretha Batzenschlagerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。バデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォートでの職業はschoolmaster, mayorと記録されている。彼は1691年10月23日に故郷で64歳で死去し，ドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグランドクレイス カルルスルヘストゥテンセスタフォートにて埋葬された。

ko.Staffort, Stutensee, Karlsruhe, Baden-Wü: 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 칼스루헤 스투텐시 스태포트
독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 칼스루헤 스투텐시 스태포트
ko.lifeSummary: Johann Jakob Stober(이)가 1627년 1월 16일 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 칼스루헤 스투텐시 스태포트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johann Martin Stober(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Catherina Wolf(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1645년 2월 21일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스태포트에서 Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스태포트에서 schoolmaster, mayor이었다. 그는 1691년 10월 23일 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 칼스루헤 스투텐시 스태포트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Jakob Stober nasceu em 16 de janeiro de 1627, em Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Johann Martin Stober, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Anna Catherina Wolf, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager em 21 de fevereiro de 1645, em Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhos e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como schoolmaster, mayor em Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Ele faleceu em 23 de outubro de 1691, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.Staffort, Stutensee, Karlsruhe, Baden-Wü: стаффорт, стутенси, ландкрис карлсрух, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия
стаффорт, стутенси, ландкрис карлсрух, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johann Jakob Stober родился 16 января 1627 г. в местности стаффорт, стутенси, ландкрис карлсрух, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени Johann Martin Stober было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Anna Catherina Wolf, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager 21 февраля 1645 г. в местности стаффорт, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден. У них было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии schoolmaster, mayor в местности стаффорт, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден. Он умер 23 октября 1691 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности стаффорт, стутенси, ландкрис карлсрух, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия.

es.Staffort, Stutensee, Karlsruhe, Baden-Wü: Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania
Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johann Jakob Stober nació el 16 de enero de 1627, en Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Johann Martin Stober, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Anna Catherina Wolf, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager el 21 de febrero de 1645, en Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Fueron padres de por lo menos 12 hijos y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era schoolmaster, mayor en Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Murió el 23 de octubre de 1691, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania.
